T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
124 
PRVDR_SEX_CD 
LABEL: 
Provider Sex Code 
DESCRIPTION: Sex of the provider, either biological sex or their self-identified sex. Applicable to individual providers 
only. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_SEX_CD 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_SEX_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
F: Female 
M: Male 
Null/missing 
COMMENT: 
Derived from
